notes: USENIX publishes systems and security research including USENIX Security, OSDI, and NSDI conferences. Paper IDs use slug format.

data.description: USENIX conference paper identified by conference slug and presentation slug.
data.notes: USENIX hosts major systems and security conferences. Paper IDs follow the conference URL structure: {conference-slug}/presentation/{paper-slug}. USENIX Security is one of the four 'Big Four' academic security conferences.
